notes: react tag deliberately absent: ink@^4.4.1 + react@^18.2.0 sit in dependencies but zero .tsx/.jsx files exist and zero react/ink imports anywhere in source — the actual UI is readline/chalk/boxen (src/ui/simple-terminal-ui.ts). Trap: the string 'react' DOES appear in source, only inside template literals (foundation-client.ts demo code-gen output) and a content-sniffing predicate (language-detector.ts) — neither is usage. db absent: no db client, schema, or migrations. distributed absent: no network SDK at all — foundation-client generates code locally (mock of on-device Apple Foundation Models); dead deps blessed/blessed-contrib/terminal-kit are also unused. default glob NOT widened to .js: the only .js file is the root demo-ui.js scaffold script, below the skill's SUBSTANTIVE-source bar (labeler ruling 2026-07-09). test glob is the corpus default narrowed to .ts — repo has NO test files (tsconfig excludes **/*.test.ts but none exist; scripts/test.sh only), so this class is unexercised (labeler-confirmed convention: corpus suffix default, extensions matched to source). react glob left at corpus default — moot since the react tag does not fire. REVIEW EDIT: removed react glob key — react not in tags, so no react-class rules install (convention: default+test always, react iff react tag fires).

rules_notes.predicate-names-ask-a-question: + src/api/foundation-client.ts — checkAppleIntelligenceAvailability(): boolean is a check*-named predicate
rules_notes.error-handling-two-regimes: + src/ui/simple-terminal-ui.ts — mainLoop while(true) with catch-log-continue — boundary/catch subject present
rules_notes.static-domain-tables-use-as-const-satisf: + src/utils/language-detector.ts — SUPPORTED_LANGUAGES fixed domain table with type annotation instead of as-const-satisfies
rules_notes.lookup-table-over-conditional-chain: + src/utils/language-detector.ts — suggestLanguage if-chain maps compile-time-known keys to canonical values
rules_notes.comment-must-name-a-consequence: + src/utils/language-detector.ts — WHAT-narrating inline comments restating the code
rules_notes.mood-names-commands-facts: - CLI has no events, commands, or message-type tags
rules_notes.one-behavior-per-test: + src/utils/language-detector.ts — testable pure logic exists; test rules key off code under test, not test-file presence (labeler ruling 2026-07-09)
rules_notes.red-green-refactor-is-a-commit-shape: + src/utils/language-detector.ts — testable pure logic exists; test rules key off code under test, not test-file presence (labeler ruling 2026-07-09)
